title: The Economic Method of LaRouche
description: Jason Ross, with the U.S. Schiller Institute, delivers the keynote address on Panel IV of the Schiller Institute's international conference, Fulfilling the Dream of Mankind, in Bad Soden, Germany, November 26, 2017. His speech is titled "The Economic Method of LaRouche: A Non-Scalar Approach to the Value of Science and Infrastructure" For the full conference proceedings visit, http://newparadigm.schillerinstitute.com/fulfilling-dream-mankind/
